login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

forgot_password.title: Reset Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset code

reset_password.title: Create New Password
reset_password.subtitle: Enter a new password to secure your account

email.invalid: Email must be a valid email address.

password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
password.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
password.lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
password.number: Password must contain at least one number.
password.special: Password must contain at least one special (!@#$%^&*) character.
password.invalid: Password contains unsafe or invalid content.

error.title: Login Error
error.description: There was an issue while trying to log in. Please try again.

deleted.title: Account Inactive or Deleted
deleted.description: The account associated with {email} is currently disabled or has been deleted. To regain access, please request a verification code so your previous account can be restored if possible.

invalid.title: Invalid Input
invalid.description: Please provide valid information and try again.

not_found.title: Account Not Found
not_found.description: No account exists with the provided credentials.

blocked.title: Account Blocked
blocked.description: Your account has been blocked. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact support.

unauthorized.title: Incorrect Credentials
unauthorized.description: The username or password you entered is incorrect.

google.title: Use Google Account
google.description: Please log in using your Google account.

tooManyRequests.title: Too Many Requests
tooManyRequests.description: You have made too many requests. Please try again later.

gone.title: Account No Longer Available
gone.description: The account you are trying to access is no longer available. Please contact support for assistance.

success.title: Reset Code Sent!
success.description: Check your email for the password reset code.

error.title: Error
error.description: An error occurred. Please try again.

not_found.title: Account Not Found
not_found.description: No account exists with this email address.

invalid.title: Invalid Input
invalid.description: Please provide a valid email address.

tooManyRequests.title: Too Many Requests
tooManyRequests.description: You have made too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.

forgot_password.check_email: If this email exists in our system, you will receive a password reset code shortly.

success.title: OTP Verified!
success.description: Your OTP has been verified successfully.

error.title: Verification Failed
error.description: The OTP you entered is incorrect. Please try again.

invalid.title: Invalid OTP
invalid.description: The OTP you entered is invalid. Please try again.

expired.title: OTP Expired
expired.description: The OTP has expired. Please request a new one.

resend.title: Code Resent
resend.description: A new OTP has been sent to your email.

reset_password.title: Create New Password
reset_password.subtitle: Enter a new password to secure your account

success.title: Password Reset Successfully!
success.description: Your password has been reset. You can now login with your new password.

error.title: Password Reset Failed
error.description: An error occurred while resetting your password. Please try again.

invalid.title: Invalid Input
invalid.description: Please provide a valid password and try again.

pin.label: Pin
pin.message: Please enter received 6 digit pin. If you didn't receive the pin, click on resend.

success.title: Pin sent!
success.description: You have successfully sent the pin to {email}.

error.title: Error!
error.description: An error occurred while sending the pin.

not_found.title: Account Not Found
not_found.description: The email {email} you are trying to verify does not exist.

invalid.title: Invalid Input
invalid.description: Please provide valid information and try again.

blocked.title: Account Blocked
blocked.description: Your account has been temporarily blocked. Please contact support for assistance.

otp_too_soon.title: Please Wait
otp_too_soon.description: A verification code was recently sent. Please wait a moment before requesting another OTP.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.description: You are not authorized to perform this action.

expired.title: OTP Expired
expired.description: The one-time password (OTP) has expired. Please request a new code and try again.

success.title: Pin resent!
success.description: You have successfully resent the pin.

error.title: Error!
error.description: An error occurred while resending the pin.

success.title: Pin verified!
success.description: You have successfully verified the pin.

error.title: Error!
error.description: An error occurred while verifying the pin.

login.title: Login to your Account
login.description: Sign in to your Azpag account.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.description: Create a new password for your Azpag account.

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.description: You do not have permission to access this resource. Your account role does not have the required permissions.

not_found.title: Page Not Found
not_found.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Please check the URL or return to the dashboard.

server_error.title: Something went wrong
server_error.description: An unexpected error occurred. We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try again later or contact support if the problem persists.
